textPlain: I see potential for speedrunning since the apples are always in the same position.

I mean there's not much of a game really, but I like it for what it is. It's also cute and the controls feel surprisingly snappy. My suggestion would be to try this typical responsive meta tag so the viewport does not scroll: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Guides/Vie...
Reminds me of Ant for the HP48 calculator, though I have a feeling that was way before your time ;-)https://www.hpcalc.org/details/6681
I like the big head and the smile on the ant
It must be a slow news day.
It's a Show HN that doesn't appear to be vibe-coded AI slop. I'll take it any day of the week.
